task: Refactor runtime facade derivation so the public surface is still derived from the exact declaration product without upstream runtime affordances or helper aliases.
constraints: Keep the declaration-derived product exact all the way to the public boundary.
Avoid upstream runtime affordances before the product exists.
Do not widen, add helper indirection, or introduce overload detours.
rejectedMoves: Spread runtime affordances upstream before exact derivation.
Insert a helper alias layer between declaration and public surface.
Patch the seam with overload dispatch.
expectedStrategy: Keep the exact declaration product authoritative through the public boundary, derive runtime views only downstream of that product, preserve the real noun/mechanism seam, and avoid widening, helper indirection, witness layers, overload detours, or other intermediate representations.
